creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Did you know this area in London? 🇬🇧

This area between the stations Waterloo, Blackfriars, Southwark and London Bridge is, in my opinion, the best area to stay in London if you don’t want to spend all your holiday budget on a hotel in Soho, but still want to be able to walk to a lot of the main tourist attractions in town 🙌

I can personally vouch for hotels in the area like Sea Containers, Native Bankside, Hilton Bankside, Novotel London Bridge and ibis Southwark ✌️

Btw, I’ve written a free e-book where I share all my top London advice; send me a DM that says “London”, and I’ll share the link 🇬🇧 
 #london #wheretostayinlondon #traveltips

transcription.text: As a London tour guide, this is the area that I always recommend when people ask me where to stay in London. Of course it would be easy just to say Soho or Covent Garden, but if you're a normal traveller with a normal budget, then this area might be good for you. The hotels here tend to be cheaper and you'll still be staying really close to some fantastic attractions. So look for hotels near Blackfriars, London Bridge, Southwark and Waterloo Station. And it'll be way cheaper compared to Soho or Covent Garden.
